mapper.select:
SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, NVL(M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음') AS writerNickname,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS commentCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS imageCount,
( SELECT IMAGE_URL FROM ( SELECT BI.IMAGE_URL FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ORDER BY BI.IMAGE_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS thumbnailUrl,
( SELECT LINK_URL FROM ( SELECT BI.LINK_URL FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ORDER BY BI.IMAGE_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS linkUrl
FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType} ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID DESC

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, NVL(M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음') AS writerNickname,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS commentCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS imageCount
FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, BOARD_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content} )

INSERT INTO BOARD_IMAGE ( IMAGE_ID, BOARD_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{originalName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{savedName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT IMAGE_ID AS imageId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ORIGINAL_NAME AS originalName, SAVED_NAME AS savedName, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM BOARD_IMAGE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY IMAGE_ID ASC
